statement.en: Anthropogenic contamination in British Columbia sea otters (Enhydra lutris) from polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAH) and per- and poly-fluoroalkyl substances (PFAS)
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargoed thesis with no accessible abstract or substantive content. The truth-value of claims cannot be evaluated without the actual research data, methodology, or findings. This is observation-impossible in the current state.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 汚染物質が生命の呼吸を分母にするとき、清浄さは分子から消える。
